name: Stair Ball: Hyper Casual
description: Step into endless fun and test your reflexes with Stair Ball: Hyper Casual! Conquer 75 exciting levels, each step getting tougher and requiring more focus Unlock 28 mysterious achievements, discover surprises, and boost your gameplay! Gain the upper hand with 3 powerful upgrades: Coin Gain, Starting Time, and Starting Heart
instructions: The ball moves quickly left and right on its own harr and your only job is to tap to make it jump Each tap takes the ball one step higher but beware mdash hitting red spikes will cost you hearts Race against time collect as many coins as possi
